actions.shell: osascript -e 'tell app "System Events"' -e 'keystroke "p" using command down' -e 'delay 0.1' -e 'keystroke "v" using command down' -e 'delay 0.05' -e 'key code 36' -e 'end tell' && /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/actions/cleanup-external-state.sh --warpd reset --homerow reset --scroll-timer reset --hover-mode reset --lmode-modifier reset && echo norm > /tmp/karabiner-layer
